member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.HptpTimingCalibration.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod
member.summary: Dummy description of this test method.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.HptpTimingCalibration.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.NominalMode
member.summary: Used to select whether to set back to nominal mode.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.HptpTimingCalibration.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.NominalMode.TRUE
member.summary: Reset to nominal

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.HptpTimingCalibration.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.NominalMode.FALSE
member.summary: No reset to nominal

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.HptpTimingCalibration.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.Patlist
member.summary: Gets or sets Patlist to execute the timing calibration on.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.HptpTimingCalibration.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.MaskPins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated pins for mask.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.HptpTimingCalibration.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.TimingCalibratePins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated pins for timing calibration.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.HptpTimingCalibration.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.TimingCalibrationNames
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated Params for timing calibration.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.HptpTimingCalibration.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.TimingCalPatmodConfiguration
member.summary: Gets or sets the configuration to patch the termination codes in the timing calibration pattern.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.HptpTimingCalibration.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.StartLargeOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets the static value for the starting point in the Y axis for the 1D shmoo.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.HptpTimingCalibration.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.XAxisDriveOffsetParameter
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the global drive offset parameter for the RX pins.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.HptpTimingCalibration.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.YAxisStrobeOffsetParameter
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the global strobe offset parameter for the TX pins.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.HptpTimingCalibration.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.TimingsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets TimingsTc for plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.HptpTimingCalibration.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.TimingCalibrationRange
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum swing range for the timing calibration to take place.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.HptpTimingCalibration.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.CalTDRRegisterFieldSequence
member.summary: Gets or sets the field sequence value of the cal tdr register to be patmod into the pattern.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.HptpTimingCalibration.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.ResetToNominal
member.summary: Gets or sets the option to restore the timing specs after the test is executed.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.HptpTimingCalibration.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.MaxCaptures
member.summary: Gets or sets maximum number of captures admited before pattern execution is stopped.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.HptpTimingCalibration.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.LevelsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets LevelsTc to plist execution.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.HptpTimingCalibration.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.RunTimingCalibration(System.Double)
member.summary: Runs the timing calibration test for all the lanes in the TimingCalibratePins list.
member.param: The starting point in the Y axis for the 1D shmoo.
member.returns: State of the timing calibration, true if calibration was possible, false if not.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.HptpTimingCalibration.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.GetInitialTimingTC
member.summary: Populates the parameterDefault list once per verify (once per TP run).
